title: cyperus fugax
intro: Cyperus fugax, also known as the desert flatsedge, is a species of sedge that is native to the deserts of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus fugax include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing digestive issues, among others. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
